old_value: {"id":"AB-rwh","title":"Dashboard coverage P0: surface AgentTasks parse failures","description":"Fix silent failure in AgentTasksViewModel where malformed bd JSON currently yields empty tasks with no error. {"id":"AB-dxu","title":"Dashboard coverage P0: expose gateway session refresh failures","description":"AppState.refreshGatewaySessions currently swallows all errors, which can leave dashboard/session widgets blank with no user feedback.
